author: doll-agent
content: Implemented manipulation extras: ma_concatenate(a, b, axis) (mask is concatenated alongside data), MaskedArray::clip(a_min, a_max) (masked elements pass through unchanged), MaskedArray::repeat(repeats) (mask propagates through repeats), atleast_1d/atleast_2d/atleast_3d (each promotes 0-D/1-D/2-D inputs to the requested rank with mask preserved), expand_dims(axis), and MaskedArray::diagonal(k) for 2-D arrays (returns 1-D MaskedArray of diagonal elements). reshape/ravel/flatten/transpose/squeeze/take are already on MaskedArray from manipulation.rs. concatenate/stack family axis variants beyond two-arg are deferred (numpy variadic concatenate maps awkwardly; users iterate).
